testcase.name: testTemperaturePersist
testcase.system-out: +++ testTemperaturePersist +++ Creating new weather controller. [6.0, 9.0, 3.0] Temperature: 19.5 of hour: 10, saved at 16:17:46 Persist time: 16:17:46, now: 16:17:47 Valid window: [16:17:48, 16:17:47, 16:17:46], persistTime: 16:17:46 Closing weather controller.
